name: Remove Tax and make new payment

steps.name: Given I am on the HOME page
When I clock in the timesheet with PIN "8754"
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('8', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('7', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('5', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('4', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM', exact: true })
Then I should see the employee "Iris" in the employee list
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
When I select the "FULL SET & FILL IN" category
Expect "toHaveText" locator('button.MuiButtonBase-root').getByText('FULL SET & FILL IN', { exact: true })
Click locator('button.MuiButtonBase-root').getByText('FULL SET & FILL IN', { exact: true })
And I add the "Taxable" service to my cart
Then I should see my cart showing 1 item added
And I should see the tax amount non-zero
When I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see the text "PAYMENT TICKET" visible
When I select the "Cash" payment type
And I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "Close Ticket"
And I should see a popup dialog with content "CHANGE$0.00OK"
When I click on the "OK" button in the popup dialog
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
When I wait for the page fully loaded
And I click on the header menu
And I select the "Manager" label in the menu list
And I select the "Ticket Adjustment" label in the expanded list
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div.xMenu__link span').getByText('Ticket Adjustment', { exact: true })
Click locator('div.xMenu__link span').getByText('Ticket Adjustment', { exact: true })
Then I should be redirected to TICKET_ADJUSTMENT page
And I should see the "Ticket Adjustment" screen
And I should see the text "TICKET#" visible
When I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see the first ticket with total "$16.96"
When I select the first ticket with total "$16.96"
Then I should see the service "Taxable" in my cart
And I should see the tax amount non-zero
Then I should see the tax display "$0.00"
Then I should see the payment history "Cash" visible
When I remove the payment history "Cash"
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div[role="dialog"]').getByRole('button', { name: 'Yes, void it', exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').getByRole('button', { name: 'Yes, void it', exact: true })
And I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "PAYMENT TICKET"
When I select the "Gift" payment type
Then I should see the "ID GIFT CARD" name
When I fill the Gift card with "1111"
And I click on the "CHECK BALANCE" button
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'CHECK BALANCE', exact: true })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'CHECK BALANCE', exact: true })
And I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should see the payment history "Gift (1111)" visible
When I adjust tip amount "10" in ticket adjustment
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('.MuiDialogTitle-root').filter({ hasText: /adjust\s+tip/i }) }).last().getByRole('button', { name: /add\s*tip/i })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('.MuiDialogTitle-root').filter({ hasText: /adjust\s+tip/i }) }).last().getByRole('button', { name: /add\s*tip/i })
And I click on the "CONFIRM" button
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "Confirm Save Ticket"
When I click on the "SAVE" button in the popup dialog
And I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see the text "Please select a ticket." in the ticket adjustment screen
